rationale: Increasing the statutory exemption amount may require affected agencies to update administrative rules reflecting the new $200,000 threshold, triggering the 30-day notice and publication requirements of this section.
quote: A state agency shall give at least 30 days' notice of its intention to adopt a rule before it adopts the rule.
_note: Gov't Code §2001.023 governs agency rulemaking notice, not statutory amendments directly. Conflict is indirect: any conforming rule updates would need to comply with these notice procedures.
